summary: A brief biographical sketch of Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw detailing her journey from a master brewer facing gender discrimination to the founder of Biocon India. The text highlights her early days starting the company in her garage, its growth into a global biopharmaceutical firm, and her core focus on affordable innovation.

principles.statement: Make affordable innovation the foundation of the business model.
principles.rationale: To ensure that world-class therapeutics and healthcare solutions can reach patients globally and make India a healthier place for all its inhabitants.
